AxReportDesign.Name: Report
AxReportDesign.Text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Report xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/sqlserver/reporting/2016/01/reportdefinition" </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM ETGSPAINInventValueContractApplicationDatesReportDP.ETGSPAINInventValueConAppTmp</CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <Fields> <Field Name="Amount"> <DataField>ETGSPAINInventValueConAppTmp.1.Amount</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="AvgPrice">
